title: Tetrorchidiopsis oppositifolia
taxonomy: Tetrorchidiopsis oppositifolia is classified within the family Clusiaceae, also known as the staphylocarpous family. This family consists of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical regions. Tetrorchidiopsis oppositifolia is further classified within the genus Tetrorchidiopsis, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The species is native to Southeast Asia, where it can be found growing in dense forests and mountainous regions. Classification into more specific ranks, such as family and order, would place Tetrorchidiopsis oppositifolia within the order Malpighiales.
